snippet.title: Build a REAL Delivery App with Codex and Supabase (Full Tutorial)
snippet.description:
► Grab The Full Prompt Pack, Exclusive Tutorials & Support: https://www.patreon.com/jamesnocode

FREE CODEX TUTORIALS:
► https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLrOdxQrSTe5EGcl-DgAemdX8NUjc0F4ru

COURSES:
► Comprehensive FlutterFlow Training & Private Community: https://masteringflutterflow.com
► Comprehensive Supabase Training & Private Community: https://masteringsupabase.com 
► [NEW] Comprehensive BuildShip Training & Private Community: https://masteringbuildship.com 



TIMESTAMPS
00:00 Intro  
00:18 Tools We'll Be Using  
01:17 Tech Stack Overview  
05:40 Visual Diagram & Entity Setup  
10:04 Planning the Expo Delivery App Backend  
13:33 Launching the Blank Expo App  
14:49 Debugging Our First Issue  
17:19 Generating the Stitch Prompt 
31:30 Configuring the Supabase Backend  
36:17 Supabase Data & RLS Configuration  
38:55 Connecting Supabase to Expo  
42:15 Building the Restaurant Browsing Experience  
45:19 Adding Categories, Filters & Favorites  
48:45 Building the Cart Detail Flow  
50:47 Adding Item Customization  
53:22 Building Checkout & Order Flow  
56:02 Adding Saved Addresses & Delivery Flow  
58:05 Building Profile, Orders & Tracking  
1:00:08 Adding the Order Status Timeline  
1:01:58 Debugging & Testing the Full Simulator  
1:06:21 Final Simulator Demo Pass  
1:08:12 Improvements & Refinements  
1:10:13 Part 2?
1:10:37 Prompts & Resources
